authors.author: Carl Tuttle
John Wimber
Ich singe ein Lied meinem König und Gott (Ich bete an)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I wanna sing a new song, Shout it out louder than before, Let the whole earth sing, The whole earth sing.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is a place where we can seek His face, Changed in His presence where touched by His grace, There is a sound I hear it all around, Worship is rising and people crying out.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I wanna sing a new song, Shout it out louder than before, Let the whole earth sing, The whole earth sing It's a song of praise, A song for all of the redeem, Let the whole earth sing, The whole earth sing.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Never the same, He's taken my chains, There's freedom in Jesus, power to save, There is a name like no other name, There's freedom in Jesus, Shout out His name.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Verse 8 Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah
